meta.title: Kairo — Your personal system of evolution
meta.description: A calm Mentor, a dojo of practices, a garden of reflections, and a weekly letter. A sustainable rhythm — no hype, no noise.

hero.subtitle: A calm Mentor, a garden of reflections, a dojo of practices and a weekly letter. A rhythm that sustains itself — no hype, no noise.

intro.title: Not another productivity app.
intro.body: Kairo is the right time — the instant something is decided. A space to meet yourself every day, in silence, and build who you want to become.

pilares.title: Everything that sustains a real rhythm.
pilares.subtitle: Nothing here is free of purpose. Each part of Kairo exists to sustain one thing: your presence.

mentor.title: A mentor that listens.
mentor.body: A serene interlocutor, always available. Calm tone, no hype, no markdown. He doesn't push you. He reminds you who you said you wanted to be.
mentor.highlight: Constant presence. No judgement, no rush.

dojo.title: Five practices. Nothing more.
dojo.body: The Dojo is the place of your daily practices. Five at most — because more than that is dispersion. See your seven-day streak and cultivate rhythm, not rush.
dojo.highlight: Five practices is the limit. More than that is dispersion.

jardim.title: Three questions a day.
jardim.body: Morning, afternoon and night — one guided question per period. You write without rushing, in your own time. The Garden is the quiet record of who you're becoming.
jardim.highlight: Guided reflections, never an empty prompt.

carta.title: Sunday, 9 PM.
carta.body: Every week the Mentor writes you a letter — patterns detected, silent achievements and a question for the next seven days. It arrives on Sunday at 9 PM.
carta.highlight: The letter is guaranteed — even in the busiest weeks.

mentor.title: Mentor
mentor.caption: Where are we today?
mentor.greeting: Welcome back. What deserves your attention now?
mentor.user: Today was hard to start. Woke up late.
mentor.reply: Today's delay doesn't erase the week's rhythm. Begin from silence — just that.

jardim.title: Garden
jardim.caption: Guided reflection
jardim.question: What deserves your attention until the end of the day?

reflections.a: With coffee made slowly — before the phone.
Having said no twice without guilt.

biblioteca.title: Library
biblioteca.caption: A study of yourself
biblioteca.excerpt: This week, three silent achievements — and a pattern that deserves attention...

silencio.title: Four shapes of pause.
silencio.subtitle: When the noise grows, Kairo turns off the world for you — it enables Do Not Disturb and holds the space.

items.title: Strategic pause
items.body: Ten minutes with a single question.

passos.title: You answer four questions.
passos.body: Who you want to become. What throws you off balance. Which area to reorder. At what pace. That configures the Mentor.

passos.title: You receive your first practice.
passos.body: Five minutes of silence on waking. For seven days. Simple — but enough to begin.

passos.title: You talk to the Mentor.
passos.body: When you need it. About what you need. He listens to what you wrote in your reflections and last week's letter.

passos.title: You receive Sunday's letter.
passos.body: 9 PM. Patterns, achievements and a question for the next seven days. The cycle sustains itself.

depoimentos.title: Not a habit app. A way of being.

items.quote: I don't feel pressured. I feel reminded.
items.author: Marina

items.quote: For the first time I can keep five practices without quitting on Thursday.
items.author: Pedro

items.quote: Sunday's letter has become the moment I look forward to most.
items.author: Ana

items.quote: The Mentor reminds me of who I said I wanted to be. Without judgment.
items.author: Lucas

items.quote: It's the only app that leaves me quieter after I open it.
items.author: Sofia

items.quote: I left TikTok to open Kairo. I didn't expect that.
items.author: Rafael

comparar.title: Seven full days. Then the rhythm continues.
comparar.subtitle: The trial isn't a stripped-down version. It's the whole Kairo for a week — no card required to start.

pricing.title: Seven days to feel it. Then you decide.
pricing.name: Kairo
pricing.description: The whole of Kairo. Seven days to try — then $12.90/month or $87.90/year.
features: Up to 5 practices in the Dojo
pricing.ctaNote: No charge for the first 7 days.

faq.title: What you might want to know.

items.a: You use the whole of Kairo for seven days — Mentor, Dojo, Garden, weekly Letter and Silent Mode, all unlocked. At the end of the trial, pick monthly or yearly to continue.

items.q: What happens if I don't subscribe after 7 days?
items.a: Access pauses quietly. Your reflections and practice streaks stay saved — when you come back and subscribe, the rhythm picks up where it left off.
Yes, no fee and no friction. You cancel directly via the receipt sent by email. Access continues until the end of the paid period.
On Supabase servers with Row Level Security — each user only reads and edits their own rows. Conversations with the Mentor do not train any AI model.

items.q: How many languages does Kairo support?
items.a: Portuguese, English, Spanish and German. You choose on first open and can switch anytime.

items.q: Why is five practices the limit?
items.a: Because more than that is dispersion. Kairo prefers five things kept to twenty things started.

items.q: Does the weekly letter work even if I didn't practice much?
items.a: It does. The Mentor writes about what happened — including the silence. A sparse week's letter has something to say too.

items.q: Is there a web version or only mobile?
items.a: Mobile only for now — iOS and Android. Kairo was designed for the device that's near you when the noise arrives.

ctaFinal.title: Begin in silence.
ctaFinal.subtitle: Seven days. One practice. One letter. See where the rhythm takes you.

auth.title: Sign in to continue
auth.subtitle: Use the same email as your account in the app — your subscription will be linked to it. We'll send you an access code, no password needed.
auth.codeSent: We sent a 6-digit code to {email}. Check your spam folder too.
auth.errorSend: We couldn't send the code. Please try again in a moment.
auth.errorVerify: Invalid or expired code. Please try again.
auth.errorCheckout: We couldn't start the checkout. Please try again.

sucesso.title: Welcome to Kairo.
sucesso.body: Your 7-day trial has started. Download the app and sign in with the same email you just used — Premium will already be unlocked on your account.

notFound.title: Nothing here.
notFound.body: The page you're looking for doesn't exist — or hasn't been written yet.

termos.metaDescription: Kairo's Terms of Use — subscription, free trial, acceptable use and disclaimers.
termos.title: Terms of Use

intro.text: Welcome to **Kairo**. These Terms govern your use of the app. By creating an account or subscribing, you agree to them. If you don't agree, don't use Kairo.
This English version is a translation provided for convenience. In case of any discrepancy, the Portuguese version of these Terms prevails.

body.text: Kairo is a personal-evolution app: an AI Mentor, a Dojo of practices, a Garden of reflections and weekly letters. Its content is **reflective and for self-knowledge**.
You must be **18 or older** and provide accurate information. You are responsible for keeping your password secure and for all activity on your account.
Kairo is a **subscription** service, with a **7 (seven) day free trial** for new subscribers.

items: Purchases are made **inside the app**, via the **Apple App Store** or **Google Play** (or via Stripe, on the web). Payment uses the method registered with your store account.
**Automatic renewal:** at the end of the trial, the subscription is charged and **renews automatically** for the chosen period (monthly or yearly) until you cancel.

**Cancellation:** you can cancel at any time in the **Apple/Google** subscription settings (or in the Stripe portal, on the web). Access remains until the end of the period already paid for. Cancel at least 24h before the trial ends to avoid being charged.
**Prices:** shown in the app in your local currency before confirmation. We may change prices with prior notice; changes don't affect a cycle already paid for.
**Refunds:** follow the policies of **Apple**, **Google** or **Stripe**, depending on the purchase channel.

body.text: You agree **not** to: use the app for illegal purposes; attempt to bypass limits, security or the subscription mechanisms; reverse-engineer it; overload or abuse the infrastructure; or submit unlawful content.

The content you create (reflections, messages) is **yours**. You grant us a limited license to process and store it solely to operate the service (see the [Privacy Policy](/privacidade)). You are responsible for what you write.

The Mentor and the letters are generated by **AI** and are **reflective and motivational** in nature. **Kairo does not provide medical, psychological, therapeutic, legal or financial advice**, and is **no substitute** for qualified professionals. AI can make mistakes; use your own judgment.

**If you are in severe emotional distress or at risk**, seek professional help immediately. In an emergency, contact your local emergency services or a crisis hotline. In Brazil, **CVV** answers at **188** (24h); for emergencies dial **192** (SAMU) or **190**.
The app, the “Kairo” brand, the design and the original content are ours or licensed to us. These Terms transfer no rights over them to you.
8. Disclaimer of warranties and limitation of liability

Kairo is provided **“as is”**, with no warranty of uninterrupted availability or of results. To the maximum extent permitted by law, we are not liable for indirect, incidental or consequential damages arising from use of (or inability to use) the app.

You can **delete your account at any time inside the app** (Profile → Delete account) — deletion is immediate and permanent (see the [Privacy Policy](/privacidade)). Deleting your account does **not cancel** an active subscription: cancel it in the store settings (Apple/Google) or, if you subscribed on the web, via Stripe. We may suspend or terminate accounts that violate these Terms. Active subscriptions follow the cancellation rules in section 3.
These Terms are governed by the laws of **Brazil**. The courts of **Divinópolis/MG** are the agreed venue, subject to a consumer's right to bring an action in their own domicile.
When you download Kairo via the **App Store** or **Google Play**, you also agree to the respective store's terms. Specifically:

items: These Terms are between **you and Kairo**, **not** with Apple/Google.
**Apple/Google have no** obligation to provide support or maintenance for the app.
If the app fails to conform to an applicable warranty, you may notify Apple for a refund of the price (where one applies); to the extent permitted by law, Apple has no other warranty obligation.
**Apple and Google are third-party beneficiaries** of these Terms and may enforce them against you.
You represent that you are not located in an embargoed country nor on any prohibited-party list.

body.text: We may update these Terms. Material changes will be announced in the app or by email; continued use after they take effect means acceptance. The date at the top indicates the latest revision.

privacidade.metaDescription: How Kairo collects, uses and protects your personal data — compliant with the LGPD and the GDPR.
privacidade.title: Privacy Policy

intro.text: This Policy describes how **Kairo** (“app”, “we”) handles your personal data. By using Kairo, you agree to the practices described here.
**Data controller:** Pedro Luiz Chagas 11221073664 (“Kairo”), CNPJ 24.811.306/0001-96, Divinópolis/MG, Brazil.
This English version is a translation provided for convenience. In case of any discrepancy, the Portuguese version of this Policy prevails.

body.text: We collect only what's needed for the app to work:

items: **Account:** email and password (authentication), name and preferred language.
**Profile:** profile photo (avatar), if you upload one, and your onboarding answers (the identity you want to build, what throws you off balance, focus area, rhythm).
**Content you create:** Garden reflections, practice logs, text and voice messages exchanged with the Mentor and the weekly letters generated from them.
**AI usage data:** records of how many AI interactions you've had (to apply usage limits).
**Notifications:** reminder preferences (processed on your device).
**Technical data:** error and diagnostic logs, device identifiers needed to deliver notifications.

body.text: **We do not collect** credit-card data: payments are processed by **Apple**, **Google** or **Stripe** (on the web) — we only receive your **subscription status**, never your card details.

items: Provide and personalize the app (Mentor, Dojo, Garden, weekly letters);
Process your messages with the AI to generate responses and reflections;
Manage your account and subscription (including the trial period);
Send the reminders and notifications you set up;
Ensure security, prevent abuse and apply usage limits;
Comply with legal obligations.

body.text: We process your data based on: **performance of the contract** (providing the service you subscribe to), **consent** (e.g. AI features, notifications, photo upload), **legitimate interest** (security, fraud prevention) and **compliance with a legal obligation**.
We don't sell your data. We share it with strictly necessary providers:

head: Provider
Purpose
Data
rows: Process the Mentor's messages and generate the letters
Text of your messages/reflections, practice statistics (for the weekly letter) and your profile data (name, identity, what throws you off balance, focus, rhythm)

body.text: Each provider handles the data under data-processing agreements (DPAs) and offers protection equivalent to that of this Policy.

The Mentor and the weekly letters use models from **Anthropic (Claude)**: the text of your messages, your Garden reflections and practice statistics (used in the weekly letter) and your profile data (name, identity, what throws you off balance, focus and rhythm) are processed to generate the responses. Voice messages are transcribed by models from **Groq (Whisper)**: the audio is sent solely for transcription. Your personal content is **not used to train AI models** — neither by us nor by Anthropic or Groq (commercial APIs, under data-processing agreements that prohibit such use).

The app **asks for your consent before the first use** of these features; until you accept, none of your data is sent to the AI providers. AI responses are generated automatically and are reflective in nature — see the disclaimer in the [Terms of Use](/termos).

Some providers (Supabase, Anthropic, Groq, Apple, Google, Stripe) process data **outside Brazil**, including in the United States. By using Kairo, you agree to this transfer, carried out with adequate contractual safeguards.

We keep your data for as long as your account exists. You can **delete your account at any time inside the app** (Profile → Delete account) — deletion is immediate and permanent, removing your profile, conversations with the Mentor (text and audio), reflections, practices and progress, weekly letters and uploaded files. We also accept requests at [contact@thekairo.app](mailto:contact@thekairo.app). We retain only what the law requires. Deleting your account does **not cancel** an active App Store/Google Play subscription — cancel it in the store settings.

Under the LGPD (and the GDPR, where applicable), you may: confirm processing, access, correct, anonymize, port or **delete** your data, withdraw consent and object to processing. To exercise these, write to [contact@thekairo.app](mailto:contact@thekairo.app).

We apply technical and organizational measures: encryption in transit, row-level access control (RLS) in the database, and credential segregation. No system is 100% secure, but we work to protect your data.
Kairo is **not intended for anyone under 18**. We don't knowingly collect data from minors; if we identify any, we remove it.
We may update this Policy. Material changes will be announced in the app or by email. The date at the top indicates the latest revision.
